title: Authority Sweeper Primitive v1
description: Schema for P34 AuthoritySweeper — sweeps expired authority grants, revokes them, and emits notification records. Enforces K6 (AUTHORITY): authority grants have scope, limit, and expiry; expired grants must be revoked and notified.

sweep_id.description: Unique identifier for this sweep run.

sweep_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the sweep was executed.

grants_scanned.description: Total number of authority grants examined.

grants_expired.description: Number of grants found to be expired.

grants_revoked.description: Number of expired grants actually revoked. May be less than grants_expired if some were already revoked.

grant_id.description: Identifier of the revoked authority grant.

role_id.description: Role under which the grant was issued.

expired_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the grant expired.

revoked_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the grant was revoked by the sweeper.

notification_sent.description: Whether a notification was sent to the affected agent.

revocations.description: List of revocation records for expired grants.

sweep_operator_id.description: Identity of the operator authorizing the sweep.

operator_approval.description: Whether the operator explicitly approved this sweep run.

authority.description: Authority gate: who authorized the sweep.

receipt_hash.description: Hash-chained proof of the sweep record.

receipt.description: Receipt gate: hash-chained proof of sweep.
